description_long: This sculpture features a trio of seated figures, with the central figure resembling a Buddha, flanked by two attendants or bodhisattvas. All three figures are positioned on a shared, ornate base, with the central figure slightly elevated and displaying a serene expression and detailed hair texture. The side figures have distinct headgear and hand gestures, adding to the narrative and spiritual symbolism. The rear view reveals rectangular openings in the backs of each figure, possibly for ritual or structural purposes. The surface is dark, metallic, and appears aged, with intricate detailing on the robes and facial features. The overall composition suggests a religious or ceremonial significance, likely of East Asian origin.
description: A dark metallic sculpture of three seated figures, with a central Buddha flanked by two attendants, all on a shared ornate base. The figures display intricate detailing and spiritual symbolism.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three seated figures, with the central Buddha and two attendants clearly visible and detailed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures, showing the depth and layered arrangement of the trio.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing rectangular openings in the backs of each figure and the structure of the shared base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the profile and posture of the figures from the other direction.
attribute_subject_matter: Three seated religious figures, likely Buddha and attendants
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
